category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Australian market access, GEMS Act MEPS requirements, RCM mark, and EESS/ACMA obligations.

title.en: China-to-Australia Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Australian GEMS Act 2012 MEPS requirements, RCM electrical-safety and EMC obligations, EESS registration, and AS/NZS 60034 series standards.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与澳大利亚《GEMS 法案 2012》MEPS 要求、RCM 电气安全和 EMC 义务、EESS 注册及 AS/NZS 60034 系列标准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與澳洲《GEMS 法案 2012》MEPS 要求、RCM 電氣安全和 EMC 義務、EESS 注冊及 AS/NZS 60034 系列標準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, GEMS registration determination, RCM conformity assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current GEMS Act, EESS, ACMA, customs, and state/territory electrical safety requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、GEMS 注册裁定、RCM 合格评定、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行 GEMS 法案、EESS、ACMA、海关及各州/领地电气安全要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、GEMS 注冊裁定、RCM 合格評定、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行 GEMS 法案、EESS、ACMA、海關及各州/領地電氣安全要求。

answer_first.en: GEMS Registry pre-supply registration (unique to Australia, no CN equivalent) and the RCM mark (combining electrical safety and EMC) are the critical market-access gaps; IE3 MEPS floors are nominally aligned but test method and numeric limit differences remain.
answer_first.zh: GEMS 注册系统的供应前注册（澳大利亚独有，中国无对应制度）和 RCM 标志（涵盖电气安全与 EMC）是关键的市场准入差距；IE3 MEPS 门槛名义上一致，但测试方法和具体数值存在差异。
answer_first.zht: GEMS 注冊系統的供應前注冊（澳洲獨有，中國無對應制度）和 RCM 標誌（涵蓋電氣安全與 EMC）是關鍵的市場准入差距；IE3 MEPS 門檻名義上一致，但測試方法和具體數值存在差異。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. energyrating.gov.au, acma.gov.au, standards.org.au, iec.ch, and state/territory electrical safety regulator sites are accepted. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Does a Chinese industrial motor need GEMS registration before sale in Australia?
q.zh: 中国工业电机在澳大利亚销售前是否需要GEMS登记？
q.zht: 中國工業電機在澳大利亞銷售前是否需要GEMS登記？

a.en: Yes. Three-phase induction motors covered by the Greenhouse and Energy Minimum Standards (GEMS) Act 2012 must be registered in the GEMS Registry before supply. Registration requires meeting MEPS based on IE3 efficiency levels under AS/NZS 1359.5, and the product must carry the RCM mark for electrical safety.
a.zh: 是的。受《温室气体与能源最低标准（GEMS）法》2012年覆盖的三相感应电机，须在GEMS登记册中完成登记后方可供应。登记要求符合基于AS/NZS 1359.5 IE3效率等级的MEPS，产品还须加贴RCM标志以满足电气安全要求。
a.zht: 是的。受《溫室氣體與能源最低標準（GEMS）法》2012年覆蓋的三相感應電機，須在GEMS登記冊中完成登記後方可供應。登記要求符合基於AS/NZS 1359.5 IE3效率等級的MEPS，產品還須加貼RCM標誌以滿足電氣安全要求。

q.en: Does China's GB 18613-2020 IE3 test result satisfy Australia's MEPS requirement?
q.zh: 中国GB 18613-2020 IE3测试结果是否可直接满足澳大利亚MEPS要求？
q.zht: 中國GB 18613-2020 IE3測試結果是否可直接滿足澳大利亞MEPS要求？

a.en: Not directly. While the nominal IE3 threshold is similar, Australia uses AS/NZS 1359.5 test methods which differ from China's GB/T 1032. Separate testing to the Australian standard is required to confirm conformance and support GEMS registration.
a.zh: 不能直接适用。虽然名义上的IE3门槛相近，但澳大利亚采用AS/NZS 1359.5测试方法，与中国GB/T 1032存在差异，须按澳大利亚标准另行测试，以确认符合性并支持GEMS登记。
a.zht: 不能直接適用。雖然名義上的IE3門檻相近，但澳大利亞採用AS/NZS 1359.5測試方法，與中國GB/T 1032存在差異，須按澳大利亞標準另行測試，以確認符合性並支持GEMS登記。

q.en: Which mark must appear on an industrial motor sold in Australia?
q.zh: 在澳大利亚销售的工业电机须加贴哪种标志？
q.zht: 在澳大利亞銷售的工業電機須加貼哪種標誌？

a.en: The RCM (Regulatory Compliance Mark) is required, demonstrating compliance with electrical safety and EMC requirements under the EESS framework. The RCM replaces the former C-Tick and A-Tick marks and must be obtained through an Australian/New Zealand Responsible Supplier.
a.zh: 须加贴RCM（法规符合性标志），证明符合EESS框架下的电气安全和EMC要求。RCM已取代原C-Tick和A-Tick标志，须通过澳大利亚/新西兰责任供应商获得。
a.zht: 須加貼RCM（法規符合性標誌），證明符合EESS框架下的電氣安全和EMC要求。RCM已取代原C-Tick和A-Tick標誌，須通過澳大利亞/新西蘭責任供應商獲得。
